title: Bad Bunny Shares Emotional Message to Peru Fans Following Lima Concerts
detail: Following sold-out concerts in Lima, Peru as part of the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour, Bad Bunny shared an emotional message to Peruvian fans on April 13, 2026, stating "Peru is key… it's not an empty phrase, it's a fact." The message underscored his deep connection with Latin American audiences and his deliberate stance of prioritizing South American tour stops over U.S. dates — a position he has publicly linked to immigration politics throughout the tour cycle.

sources.name: Hola! US — Bad Bunny's Peru Love Letter

media.caption: Bad Bunny shares emotional message to Peru fans following Lima concerts on the DTMF World Tour
